'''nawate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hidingly|hidingly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-w-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hidingly|hidingly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| nawate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:nawate|nawate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nawatesher|nawatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nawatesherĂ«m|nawatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nawatero|nawatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nawateshĂ«|nawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nawateshĂ«m|nawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinawatero|gokinawatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinawateshĂ«|gokinawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinawateshĂ«m|gokinawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonawankerom|gonawankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonawankeshĂ«|gonawankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonawankeshĂ«m|gonawankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonawankeya|gonawankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nawaterom|nawaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nawatemu|nawatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nawateya|nawateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinawaterom|gokinawaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinawatemu|gokinawatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinawateya|gokinawateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:nawawate|nawawate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nawawatesher|nawawatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nawawatesherĂ«m|nawawatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nawawatero|nawawatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nawawateshĂ«|nawawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nawawateshĂ«m|nawawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinawawatero|gokinawawatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinawawateshĂ«|gokinawawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinawawateshĂ«m|gokinawawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonawawankerom|gonawawankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonawawankeshĂ«|gonawawankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonawawankeshĂ«m|gonawawankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonawawankeya|gonawawankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nawawaterom|nawawaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nawawatemu|nawawatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nawawateya|nawawateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinawawaterom|gokinawawaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinawawatemu|gokinawawatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinawawateya|gokinawawateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:nĂŠwĂŠte|nĂŠwĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nĂŠwĂŠtesher|nĂŠwĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠwĂŠtesherĂ«m|nĂŠwĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nĂŠwĂŠtero|nĂŠwĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«|nĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m|nĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinĂŠwĂŠtero|gokinĂŠwĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«|gokinĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m|gokinĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonĂŠwĂŠnkerom|gonĂŠwĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«|gonĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gonĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonĂŠwĂŠnkeya|gonĂŠwĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nĂŠwĂŠterom|nĂŠwĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠwĂŠtemu|nĂŠwĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nĂŠwĂŠteya|nĂŠwĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinĂŠwĂŠterom|gokinĂŠwĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinĂŠwĂŠtemu|gokinĂŠwĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinĂŠwĂŠteya|gokinĂŠwĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:nafwafte|nafwafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nafwaftesher|nafwaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafwaftesherĂ«m|nafwaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nafwaftero|nafwaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nafwafteshĂ«|nafwafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafwafteshĂ«m|nafwafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinafwaftero|gokinafwaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinafwafteshĂ«|gokinafwafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinafwafteshĂ«m|gokinafwafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonafwafnkerom|gonafwafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonafwafnkeshĂ«|gonafwafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonafwafnkeshĂ«m|gonafwafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonafwafnkeya|gonafwafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nafwafterom|nafwafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafwaftemu|nafwaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nafwafteya|nafwafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinafwafterom|gokinafwafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinafwaftemu|gokinafwaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinafwafteya|gokinafwafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
